title: Win Celebration Plugin Configuration
description: Configuration for the Win Celebration plugin. Place each team's GIF file alongside manager.py and reference it by filename in the team's gif_file field.

teams.description: Teams to monitor. Each team can have its own GIF, win text, and brand colors. All configured teams are monitored simultaneously — when multiple teams win on the same day each celebration fires independently.

abbreviation.description: ESPN team abbreviation (e.g. PIT, CHC, NYY, PHI, LAL, PIT)

gif_file.description: Animated GIF filename to display on a win. Bundled options: jolly-roger.gif (Pirates), fly-the-w.gif (Cubs). Drop any custom GIF alongside manager.py and reference it by filename. Falls back to a programmatic waving-flag animation if the file is missing.

win_text.description: Short text overlay displayed when this team wins (e.g. 'RAISE IT!', 'CUBS WIN!', 'LET'S GO PENS!'). Defaults to '<ABBR> WINS!' if omitted.

primary_color.description: Team primary color used for win text and the programmatic fallback animation [R, G, B]

secondary_color.description: Team secondary color used in the programmatic fallback animation [R, G, B]

celebration_hours.description: How many hours to show the celebration after a win

team_display_duration.description: When multiple teams are celebrating simultaneously, how many seconds to show each team's animation before rotating to the next

display_duration.description: How long (in seconds) to show the plugin per rotation slot while celebrating

update_interval.description: How often (in seconds) to poll the ESPN scoreboard API

animation_fps.description: Target frames per second for the programmatic fallback animation (GIF frame durations are used instead when a GIF is loaded)

show_score.description: Overlay the final score on the display

show_text.description: Overlay the win text on the display

font_name.description: Font file to use for text overlays (from assets/fonts directory)

live_priority.description: When true, the plugin takes over the display immediately after a win instead of waiting for its normal rotation slot

transition.description: Transition settings when entering/leaving this plugin

simulate_win.description: Simulate a win for testing — activates the celebration immediately without waiting for a real game. Set back to false to cancel.

simulate_team.description: Team abbreviation to simulate winning (empty = first configured team)

vegas_mode.description: How this plugin appears in Vegas scroll mode. 'static' pauses the scroll while the GIF displays (recommended). 'fixed' scrolls it as a block.
